finding_results.notes: Removed the explicit abstract thesis lines and replaced them with immediate concrete actions: Eli asks Theo to enforce a reminder cadence and sets redundant alarms before boarding the bus.
Inserted an embodied post-EMS fallout bridge (dry-heaving, contamination cleanup, compulsive scrubbing, dissociation beat) that changes Eli's behavior before the report-writing sequence.
Replaced the formula-metaphor construction with observable behavioral impact (task error and motor tension under pressure).
Rewrote Theo's accountability text into character-specific, concrete operational terms (timing, consequences, trust reset) instead of parallel aphorism phrasing.

summary: All four packet findings were resolved with targeted structural/craft edits: stronger post-crisis causality before administration, removal of repeated metaphor template, Theo-voice-specific accountability language, and an image/action-based close that avoids abstract thematic summary.
